one_line_thesis: Vertically integrated optical transceiver supplier in a datacenter/CATV upcycle, but extreme customer concentration and dilution keep stance watch at -13.4% base IRR (~$99.77).

deep_dive.executive_summary: At $99.77 (2026-07-17 close), the base case yields -13.44% per year over seven years on normalized owner cash of $0.74 per share. Applied Optoelectronics is a vertically integrated optical transceiver supplier riding datacenter bandwidth upgrades and a CATV equipment cycle, with FY2025 revenue up 83% and Q1 2026 revenue up 51% year over year. Owner economics are distorted by a $179 million capital spending year that exceeded operating cash flow, plus share count rising from 60 million to 76 million diluted shares after equity offerings. Customer concentration (top five customers 95% of reve...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

components.label: Operating business (fallback)
components.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
components.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

components.label: Operating business (fallback)

components.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
applicability_tests: Industry capacity, additions, closures, and replacement costs can be measured.
Current margins can be located relative to a cycle rather than extrapolated.
Maintenance and growth capital are separated.
Leverage and liquidity survive the low case.
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Operating-only fallback. Add an explicit component_valuation schedule before drawing asset-level conclusions.

valuation_proof.adjustment: Risk and timing are reflected in the low/base/high range.
valuation_proof.falsifier: Owner cash, reinvestment economics, or competitive position remains below the low-case path for two reporting periods.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

personas.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

personas.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)
personas.label: Murray Stahl
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: hard_asset_archetype, moat_durable

personas.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median
personas.label: Joel Greenblatt
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: earnings_yield_high, quality_proxy

personas.label: Buffett / Weschler
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: durable_moat, compounder_archetype, dhando_not_none

personas.falsifier: Operating lens only — no dated inefficiency / catalyst
personas.label: John Mihaljevic / MOI

personas.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure
personas.label: Horizon Kinetics
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: asset_or_event, dated_payoff

personas.falsifier: Supply response, reinvestment requirements, or incremental returns cannot be measured.
personas.label: Marathon / Capital Returns

personas.falsifier: Debt maturities, refinancing exposure, liquidity, or downside recovery cannot be reconciled.
personas.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree

personas.falsifier: Asset value lacks an independently evidenced realization path or is already capitalized in operating cash flow.
personas.label: Klarman / Baupost
personas.why_silent: Universe criteria not met: asset_value, realization_path, downside_discount

timeline.label: Equity moved -99.0% versus the prior period (209,068.0 to 2,183.0).
Leadership / governance risk elevated. Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) CFO sells 4,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan - Stock Titan; 20 executive sales ($79,332,920) in 120d
Follow-on equity offering (424B5) raised growth capital while share count was expanding toward ~76M diluted shares
FY2025 10-K filed: revenue $455.7M (+83% YoY); datacenter 43% mix; reported FCF negative on $179M capex
Equity offering (424B5) during datacenter/CATV ramp to fund capacity
Amazon.com transaction agreement and warrant with Amazon.com NV Investment Holdings — datacenter supply relationship
Launched Quantum Bandwidth branded CATV equipment sold direct to MSO customers (not only through OEM vendors)
Datacenter optical transceivers became fastest-growing end market per subsequent 10-K disclosures; mix shift accelerated through 2025
Reincorporated from Texas to Delaware (Applied Optoelectronics, Inc.)
Acquired Global Technology (Ningbo, China manufacturing) via Prime World subsidiary
Company founded in Texas; vertical laser and optical systems focus

industry.structure: Optical transceiver and component market is fragmented with large merchant suppliers (e.g., Coherent, Lumentum) and vertically integrated niche players; hyperscalers multi-source 100G–800G modules with price pressure at each speed generation.
industry.share_shift: AOI is gaining datacenter socket share via integrated lasers and Asia assembly scale, but revenue remains concentrated in two customers (Digicomm distributor and Microsoft) per FY2025 10-K.
industry.trend: AI datacenter buildouts drive 800G+ optical module demand; parallel CATV operators upgrade return-path bandwidth; tariff and China/Taiwan supply-chain policy adds cost uncertainty.
